titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ فَيُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ قَالَ إِنَّ ذَلِكَ فَسَادٌ عَلَى أَصْحَابِهِ لَا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَى بَيْعِهِ وَ لَا مُؤَاجَرَتِهِ قَالَ يُقَوَّمُ قِيمَةً فَيُجْعَلُ عَلَى الَّذِي أَعْتَقَهُ عُقُوبَةً وَ إِنَّمَا جُعِلَ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهِ لِمَا أَفْسَدَهُ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ فَيُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ قَالَ إِنَّ ذَلِكَ فَسَادٌ عَلَى أَصْحَابِهِ لَا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَى بَيْعِهِ وَ لَا مُؤَاجَرَتِهِ قَالَ يُقَوَّمُ قِيمَةً فَيُجْعَلُ عَلَى الَّذِي أَعْتَقَهُ عُقُوبَةً وَ إِنَّمَا جُعِلَ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْهِ لِمَا أَفْسَدَهُ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave owned between partners, so one of them emancipates his share. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is a spoiling (of matters) upon his companion not being able upon selling him, nor hiring out his services’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His price would be evaluated, so it would be made upon the one who emancipated him as a punishment. But rather, that is made to be upon him due to what he spoilt’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave owned between partners, so one of them emancipates his share. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘That is a spoiling (of matters) upon his companion not being able upon selling him, nor hiring out his services’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His price would be evaluated, so it would be made upon the one who emancipated him as a punishment. But rather, that is made to be upon him due to what he spoilt’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

segments: إِنْ كَانَ مُضَارّاً كُلِّفَ أَنْ يُعْتِقَهُ كُلَّهُ وَ إِلَّا اسْتُسْعِيَ الْعَبْدُ فِي النِّصْفِ الْآخَرِ .
arabic.text: إِنْ كَانَ مُضَارّاً كُلِّفَ أَنْ يُعْتِقَهُ كُلَّهُ وَ إِلَّا اسْتُسْعِيَ الْعَبْدُ فِي النِّصْفِ الْآخَرِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about two men what had a slave between the two of them, so one of the two emancipated his share. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it was harmful, he would be assigned to emancipate the whole of him, or else the slave would have to work regarding the other half’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about two men what had a slave between the two of them, so one of the two emancipated his share. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it was harmful, he would be assigned to emancipate the whole of him, or else the slave would have to work regarding the other half’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادٍ عَنِ الْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

segments: مَنْ كَانَ شَرِيكاً فِي عَبْدٍ أَوْ أَمَةٍ قَلِيلٍ أَوْ كَثِيرٍ فَأَعْتَقَ حِصَّتَهُ وَ لَهُ سَعَةٌ فَلْيَشْتَرِهِ مِنْ صَاحِبِهِ فَيُعْتِقَهُ كُلَّهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ سَعَةٌ مِنْ مَالٍ نُظِرَ قِيمَتُهُ يَوْمَ أُعْتِقَ ثُمَّ يَسْعَى الْعَبْدُ بِحِسَابِ مَا بَقِيَ حَتَّى يُعْتَقَ .
arabic.text: مَنْ كَانَ شَرِيكاً فِي عَبْدٍ أَوْ أَمَةٍ قَلِيلٍ أَوْ كَثِيرٍ فَأَعْتَقَ حِصَّتَهُ وَ لَهُ سَعَةٌ فَلْيَشْتَرِهِ مِنْ صَاحِبِهِ فَيُعْتِقَهُ كُلَّهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ سَعَةٌ مِنْ مَالٍ نُظِرَ قِيمَتُهُ يَوْمَ أُعْتِقَ ثُمَّ يَسْعَى الْعَبْدُ بِحِسَابِ مَا بَقِيَ حَتَّى يُعْتَقَ .

segments: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who was a partner in a slave, or a slave girl, little or more, so he emancipates his portion, and for him is (financial) leeway, so let him buy him from his companions, so he emancipates the whole of him, and if he does not have the leeway from wealth, he should consider his price on the day he emancipates, then the slave would work by the reckoning of what remains, until he is (completely) emancipated’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Najran, from Aasim Bin Humeyd, from Muhammad Bin Qays,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who was a partner in a slave, or a slave girl, little or more, so he emancipates his portion, and for him is (financial) leeway, so let him buy him from his companions, so he emancipates the whole of him, and if he does not have the leeway from wealth, he should consider his price on the day he emancipates, then the slave would work by the reckoning of what remains, until he is (completely) emancipated’.

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيٌّ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي نَجْرَانَ عَنْ عَاصِمِ بْنِ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي عَبْدٍ كَانَ بَيْنَ رَجُلَيْنِ فَحَرَّرَ أَحَدُهُمَا نَصِيبَهُ وَ هُوَ صَغِيرٌ وَ أَمْسَكَ الْآخَرُ نِصْفَهُ حَتَّى كَبِرَ الَّذِي حَرَّرَ نِصْفَهُ قَالَ يُقَوَّمُ قِيمَةَ يَوْمَ حَرَّرَ الْأَوَّلُ وَ أُمِرَ الْمُحَرَّرُ أَنْ يَسْعَى فِي نِصْفِهِ الَّذِي لَمْ يُحَرَّرْ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَهُ .
arabic.text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي عَبْدٍ كَانَ بَيْنَ رَجُلَيْنِ فَحَرَّرَ أَحَدُهُمَا نَصِيبَهُ وَ هُوَ صَغِيرٌ وَ أَمْسَكَ الْآخَرُ نِصْفَهُ حَتَّى كَبِرَ الَّذِي حَرَّرَ نِصْفَهُ قَالَ يُقَوَّمُ قِيمَةَ يَوْمَ حَرَّرَ الْأَوَّلُ وَ أُمِرَ الْمُحَرَّرُ أَنْ يَسْعَى فِي نِصْفِهِ الَّذِي لَمْ يُحَرَّرْ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَهُ .

segments: (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a slave who was between two men. So one of the freed his share and he was young, and the other one kept his share until the one who freed was old’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His price would be evaluated on the day first freeing, and the freed one would be ordered that he work with regards to the other half which is not free, until he fulfils it’.
en.hubeali.text:
And by his chain,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a slave who was between two men. So one of the freed his share and he was young, and the other one kept his share until the one who freed was old’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘His price would be evaluated on the day first freeing, and the freed one would be ordered that he work with regards to the other half which is not free, until he fulfils it’.

narratorChain.raw: وَ بِإِسْنَادِهِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ فَيُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ فَقَالَ هَذَا فَسَادٌ عَلَى أَصْحَابِهِ يُقَوَّمُ قِيمَةً وَ يَضْمَنُ الثَّمَنَ الَّذِي أَعْتَقَهُ لِأَنَّهُ أَفْسَدَهُ عَلَى أَصْحَابِهِ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ فَيُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ فَقَالَ هَذَا فَسَادٌ عَلَى أَصْحَابِهِ يُقَوَّمُ قِيمَةً وَ يَضْمَنُ الثَّمَنَ الَّذِي أَعْتَقَهُ لِأَنَّهُ أَفْسَدَهُ عَلَى أَصْحَابِهِ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave owned between partners, so one of them emancipates his share. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is a spoiling upon his companion. His price would be evaluated, and he would be responsible for the price, the one who emancipated him because he spoilt it upon his companion’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave owned between partners, so one of them emancipates his share. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is a spoiling upon his companion. His price would be evaluated, and he would be responsible for the price, the one who emancipated him because he spoilt it upon his companion’.

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الْمَمْلُوكِ بَيْنَ شُرَكَاءَ يُعْتِقُ أَحَدُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ أَوْ يَبِيعُ
titles.en: Chapter 9 – The slave owned between partners, one of them emancipates his share, or sells

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ قَوْمٍ وَرِثُوا عَبْداً جَمِيعاً فَأَعْتَقَ بَعْضُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ مِنْهُ كَيْفَ يُصْنَعُ بِالَّذِي أَعْتَقَ نَصِيبَهُ مِنْهُ هَلْ يُؤْخَذُ بِمَا بَقِيَ قَالَ نَعَمْ يُؤْخَذُ بِمَا بَقِيَ مِنْهُ بِقِيمَتِهِ يَوْمَ أَعْتَقَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ قَوْمٍ وَرِثُوا عَبْداً جَمِيعاً فَأَعْتَقَ بَعْضُهُمْ نَصِيبَهُ مِنْهُ كَيْفَ يُصْنَعُ بِالَّذِي أَعْتَقَ نَصِيبَهُ مِنْهُ هَلْ يُؤْخَذُ بِمَا بَقِيَ قَالَ نَعَمْ يُؤْخَذُ بِمَا بَقِيَ مِنْهُ بِقِيمَتِهِ يَوْمَ أَعْتَقَ .

segments: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman,

(It has been narrated) from Abdul Rahmn Bin Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a people who altogether inherited a slave. So one of them emancipated his share from it. How would he be dealt with, the one who emancipated his share from it. Would he be seized with what remains?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes. He would be seized with what remains from it, by his price on the day he emancipated (his share)’.
en.hubeali.text:
Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Aban Bin Usman,

(It has been narrated) from Abdul Rahmn Bin Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a people who altogether inherited a slave. So one of them emancipated his share from it. How would he be dealt with, the one who emancipated his share from it. Would he be seized with what remains?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes. He would be seized with what remains from it, by his price on the day he emancipated (his share)’.

narratorChain.raw: الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُعَلَّى بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ
